title: Buggy Captures Luffy
description: On pages 1–4, buggy captures luffy focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as buggy captures Luffy at the place where Gold Roger died, turning Loguetown into a crisis.
scene: On pages 1–4, buggy captures luffy focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as buggy captures Luffy at the place where Gold Roger died, turning Loguetown into a crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A legend passed down into the far, far future...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A story that began long, long ago...

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: For the crime of angering me, I sentence you, monkey D. Luffy,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: to a flashy execution!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let's cause a flashy ruckus, boys!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yahoo!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just stand right there and watch!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is the first time I've seen an execution.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You're the one who's being executed here!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What!? Are you kidding me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No, you stop kidding around!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: your flashy execution,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: shall now be carried out for the whole public to see!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Nooo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why're you in such a rush for!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Shouldn't we be trying to save Luffy back there?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What use would we be back there!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We could back them up! I'll have you know that I took down a fishman officer all by myself!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Well, we've got something more important to worry about.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: More important?

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: A storm is headed for this island.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The air pressure and temperature's been dropping for the past while now.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Not only that, I saw cumulus clouds heading from the east.

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: That's a sure sign of a storm!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: With that ruckus going on in the town square, the marines are sure to come out.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What would we do if our ship happened to wash away when we needed to run away!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Holy crap, you're right! That is more important!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: H-Hey! Wait for me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: riding on my Richie bike~ )

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who's that, you say?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So this is that rubber brat's ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's much bigger than the one he had last time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He should be getting his flashy execution from Captain Buggy right about now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Grrr

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Heh heh

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But in the one in a million chance that he escapes,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: His ship will be burned down!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Grrr Rrr....

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: By us, that is! )

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Grrr

summary: This part turns Loguetown into a trap, bringing old enemies and Marine pressure together around Luffy.
